findings.evidence: grep hits show the unannotated declarations at lines 113 and 144; the analogous quotient-kernel normal form `normalizerQuotientMk_eq_one_iff` is registered `@[simp]` in `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:68`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to the two non-regular base equality criteria at lines 113 and 144; keep the regular wrappers as wrappers unless you want explicit `simp [regular..., hp, hreg]` use.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff` and the symmetric `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_base_eq_smul_iff` are characteristic normal-form lemmas for the new API, but they are plain lemmas, so `simp` will not reduce base orbit equalities to `φ ∈ H`.

summary: The new criteria expose the intended surface, but the base-orbit membership normal forms are not registered for automation.
